ogTitle: Willung South vs Wilsons Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willung South and Wilsons Hill.
heading: Willung South vs Wilsons Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willung South, Victoria and Wilsons Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilsons Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Willung South (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willung South or Wilsons Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willung South has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Wilsons Hill scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willung South scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsons Hill scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willung South or Wilsons Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilsons Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
